style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow-drifting mist particles that twist like smoke, casting distorted reflections on nearby surfaces; cold blue-white energy pulses visible through Mewtwo's semi-transparent skin, intensifying with each pulse; eerie purple luminescence illuminates the air with a faint glow, casting elongated, shifting shadows that bend unnaturally around its form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
